Overrides.Override: 20% reduced bonuses gained from Equipped Boots 20% increased bonuses gained from Equipped Gloves Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Bound
15% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Auras from your Skills which affect Allies also affect Enemies Limited to 1 Runegraft of Treachery
